title: [codereview] EDHOC A_3 fix in C initiator missed updating related TH_4 comment and context_3
description: P2: The A_3 external_aad now includes CRED_I but comments and other MAC_3 context_3 may need alignment for full RFC compliance. Also check if EAD_3 support is needed.
close_reason: Updated TH_4 comments and context_3 construction in C EDHOC initiator (and responder for consistency). Fixed TH_3/TH_4 to use CIPHERTEXT_* + proper compute_th(CBOR bstrs). 3 codereview passes with all findings (incl. P4) filed as beads, fixed, and closed. No findings on final passes.
